questions.q: In a May 4, 2026 policy review, it was noted that the FDA's new Real-Time Clinical Trial (RTCT) pilot program aims to incorporate what technology into early-phase trials?
Which NBA player led the Philadelphia 76ers with 34 points and 12 rebounds to a Game 7 victory over the Boston Celtics, completing a comeback from a 3-1 deficit?
A viral meme depicting Miranda Priestly as a fast-food worker in 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' was widely mistaken for AI, but was actually painted by which human artist?
In early May 2026, Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass proclaimed that Hollywood is 'turning a corner' due to an uptick in production driven by what factor?
On May 4, 2026, which video game retailer made an unsolicited $55.5 billion takeover offer for the e-commerce firm eBay?
questions.correctText: GameStop made the massive offer, proposing $125 a share and aiming to cut $1.2bn in eBay's sales and marketing spending.

questions.q: Actor Adam Scott recently revealed he auditioned for the sixth installment of which horror franchise, hoping producers wouldn't notice his character had already died in the fourth film?
According to a recent revelation by former Nintendo of America President Reggie Fils-Aimé, which major e-commerce company previously asked Nintendo to break the law with illegal financial support?
questions.correctText: Reggie Fils-Aimé stated that Nintendo stopped selling to Amazon after the retailer demanded illegal financial support to undercut Walmart's prices.

questions.q: Which NHL team defeated the Tampa Bay Lightning 2-1 in Game 7 of their 2026 first-round playoff series?
Which classic fox-masked kunoichi character was recently revealed in a new gameplay trailer as the first DLC fighter for Season 3 of Tekken 8?
questions.correctText: Kunimitsu was announced as the first DLC character of Tekken 8's Season 3 Character Pass.

questions.q: Which 1996 supernatural horror film starring Robin Tunney and Fairuza Balk celebrated its 30th anniversary on May 3, 2026?
